npm start add 'description': create a task with given description
npm start update <id> 'description': update the task with the given id

list.npm start list done: list all the tasks which are done
list.npm start list in-progress: ist all the tasks which are in-progress
list.npm start list todo: list all the tasks which are todo

npm start delete <id>: delete task with the given id
npm start mark-done: update the task's with the given id status as done
npm start mark-in-progress: pdate the task's with the given id status as done
npm start mark-todo: update the task's with the given id status as done
